## Problem

What problem or missing capability are you trying to address?

## Proposed Change

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Why It Matters

How does this improve the product, workflow, or household decision quality?

## Possible Data Sources Or UI Ideas

Optional: include source ideas, calculations, UX direction, or implementation hints.
